params.name: Disguise Mask
params.description: This funny-looking mask used to be a magical item that could give its holder extraordinary strength. The wearer of this mask was capable of transforming into any item and possessed near-immortal recovery power. Unfortunately, after a fierce battle between its previous owner and the snail, the mask was severely damaged and completely lost its powers.
